返回日报
Hacker News #2

问 HN：你在忙什么？（2026年7月）

Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (July 2026)

开发工具 作者 david927 热度 274 回复 1066 2026/07/13 05:26
打开原帖 JSON

摘要

  • Hacker News 2026年7月 'What Are You Working On?' 月度讨论帖，开发者分享各自正在开发的项目和创意。
  • 帖子获得274分、1066条回复，社区参与度极高，涵盖编程、开源、AI、硬件等多领域项目展示。

看点

  • HN 经典月度开发者项目分享帖，信息密度高
  • 覆盖 AI、编程、开源、硬件等多个科技方向
  • 1066条回复蕴含大量新兴项目和技术趋势线索
  • 适合发掘早期开源项目和开发者工具灵感
  • 反映2026年7月开发者社区关注热点

Hacker News 的 'What Are You Working On?' 月度帖子是开发者社区分享项目、工具、技术和创意的经典讨论串，涵盖编程、开源、AI、硬件等多个科技领域，具有极高的社区参与度和信息密度。

正文翻译

你在忙些什么？有什么正在考虑的新想法吗？
What are you working on? Any new ideas that you're thinking about?

回复翻译 20

cjflog 2026/07/14 02:40
我制作了 Beacon，一款用于回答“我的哪些朋友现在有空聊天？”的移动应用程序。 这基本上是一对多的电话，只有一个人可以接听。向一组发送一个信标，每个人都会同时响铃。第一个接听电话的人会接通一对一通话，而对于其他人来说，信号会默默下降。没有漏接电话或接听压力。考虑到大多数人都将手机保持静音（并且应用程序内也有安静时间设置），效果非常好。

如果您能够与至少四个您不常交谈的人加入，效果最好。我现在在该应用程序上有几十个连接，这对我来说就像魔法一样。希望仍然喜欢打电话或希望有更多电话的内向者和外向者提供反馈：

iOS TestFlight 访问权限 -> https://trybeacon.chat/

Android 也处于测试阶段 -> https://appdistribution.firebase.dev/i/afe3c44d8443c4c0

I made Beacon, a mobile app for answering: “which of my friends is free to talk right now?” It’s basically a one-to-many phone call that only one person can answer. Send a beacon to a group, and everyone gets rung at the same time. The first person who answers gets connected for a 1-1 call, and for everyone else the signal drops silently. No missed-calls or pressure to answer. Works pretty well given most people keep their phones on silent (and there are in-app settings for quiet hours too).

It works best if you're able to join with at least four people you don't speak with as much as you'd like. I have a couple dozen connections on the app now, and it feels like magic to me. Would love feedback from both introverts and extroverts who still like phone calls, or wish they had more of them:

iOS TestFlight access here -> https://trybeacon.chat/

Android also in beta here -> https://appdistribution.firebase.dev/i/afe3c44d8443c4c0

楼层
ggitelson 2026/07/14 05:30
非常有趣。我的一部分意思是，如果电话响了而我不是第一个接听的，我会感觉很糟糕。同时，我喜欢能够伸出援手并说“我想和某人交谈”。我想这对于患有抑郁症或成瘾的人来说非常有趣，他们也可以添加他们的支持小组。
Very interesting. Part of my says that if it rung and I wasn't the first to answer, I would feel bad. At the same time, I like the idea of being able to reach out and just say "I feel like talking to someone". I would imagine that it is super interesting for people with depression or addiction who could add their support group too.
楼层
cjflog 2026/07/14 08:14
如果你错过了一个Beacon，并且这让你意识到想和朋友聊聊，你完全可以自己发一个Beacon！
If you miss a Beacon and that makes you realize you want to chat with a friend, you can just send your own Beacon!
楼层
wind111 2026/07/15 18:03
哇，这个想法真酷！ 这有助于进一步增进彼此的关系！
Wow, this is cool idea! it leads to building a relationship more!
楼层
cjflog 2026/07/16 00:49
如果对您有效，请分享一下您的体验，也欢迎提供任何反馈！
please share if it works for you and any feedback you have!
楼层
telesilla 2026/07/14 04:26
如果您也能解决时区问题，我会很高兴。我的很多朋友远隔重洋，我们很少再聚在一起交谈。也许某种异步选项？
I'd love it if you can also fix the problem of timezones. So many of my friends are oceans-apart and we rarely rarely meet and talk as a group anymore. Maybe some kind of asynchronous option?
楼层
cjflog 2026/07/14 08:05
这个想法就是，只要你一有空就发个Beacon，说不定就能时不时联系上那些时区差异巨大的朋友。

我有时会在早晨通勤时发Beacon。那时候打普通社交电话太早了，但有时刚好能联系上东边几个时区正在午休的朋友之类的。

The idea is to just send a beacon whenever you're free and maybe you'll catch friends in the wildly different timezones from time to time.

I sometimes send beacons on morning commutes. Way too early for normal social calls but will sometimes catch people a few timezones east on a lunch break or something.

楼层
d1sxeyes 2026/07/14 06:33
不过，电话毕竟没法真正异步进行……
You can’t really have an asynchronous phone call though…
楼层
aliayaz112 2026/07/15 07:06
听起来很有趣，这个想法也很有意思
Sounds fun and idea is interesting
楼层
cjflog 2026/07/15 07:38
谢谢，太有趣了！我现在每周都会随性地跟朋友多聊1到2个小时。
thanks, it is fun! I now spontaneously talk to friends 1-2 hours/week more than I did.
楼层
tim-projects 2026/07/14 10:44
这让我想起 MSN、AOL 或 ICQ，它们都有在线状态和通知系统。

为什么现代消息传递系统会消失？ WhatsApp 和 Signal 没有这个功能。短信？没有把握。我认为 Facebook Messenger 可以。

我记得这是每个人都积极使用的一个重要功能。

This makes me think of MSN,AOL or ICQ which had an online status and notification system.

Why did that go away with modern messaging? WhatsApp and signal don't have it. Sms? Not sure. I think Facebook messenger does.

I can remember this was an important feature that everyone actively used.

楼层
cjflog 2026/07/14 10:58
我觉得它消失是因为每个人都变成全天候“在线”了，但这也意味着大多数交流都转向了异步模式
I think it went away because everyone became "online" all the time, but that also meant most communication transitioned to async
楼层
conrs 2026/07/14 05:49
这是一个有趣的想法。我正在构建 https://tend2thrive.com - 我可以在这里看到有趣的合作。始终寻找重新连接您的网络而不感到沉重的方法。
This is an interesting idea. I'm building https://tend2thrive.com - I could see an interesting collaboration here. Always looking for ways to re-engage your network without it feeling heavy.
楼层
arthen23 2026/07/15 08:57
这真的很有趣。 “我遇见你了，太棒了，我一直在等你，然后……现在该怎么办？”这个问题一直萦绕在我心头

我相信这会有所帮助

this is truly interesting. the question "I've met you, cool, I was waiting for you, and... now what?" is haunting me

I believe it can help

楼层
jasondigitized 2026/07/14 10:22

Curious what the stack looks like. Are you doing all the heavy lifting yourself with WebRTC or using something like LiveKit?

哦，这是一个很酷的主意。
Ooh this is such a cool idea.

gladlabs 2026/07/14 04:27

what if I don't answer quickly enough but do want to talk :(

yreg 2026/07/14 06:21

You fire off a new beacon.

andrewrn 2026/07/14 06:08
概念非常棒。有一个极其省力的方法可以改善它的接受度：把落地页的样式改一改，别弄得那么像粗制滥造的AI垃圾内容。
Super neat concept. One super low-lift way to improve its reception: change the styling of the landing page to not be blatant AI slop.
楼层
